text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's been raining since early this morning. The
track is a complete mess, however...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Neither the condition of the track nor the
looming eyes of the audience will faze me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
All the effort we've poured into this... All the
experience I've attained competing with my
rivals...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: They give me strength and push me forward.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
(My competition with Ryan at the Takarazuka
Kinen stands out as a special moment.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
(Thanks to her fierce resolve, I am determined
and ready!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
(I'll be the first of the Mejiro family to claim
consecutive victories in the spring and autumn
Tenno Sho!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The determination welling up in Mejiro
McQueen's eyes begins to dance like a blazing
fire!
choice_data_list: I'm looking forward to your victory!
I'm looking forward to your victory!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes. And I shall attain it with confidence and
ease.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I shall live up to your expectations with all my
spirit and might.
